description: Style NoteSome men demand a little more from their undergarments those men choose calvin klein Underwear. CK briefs go beyond basics - they're a style statement crafted by experienced experts to make you feel sexy, fashionable, and comfortable. These boxers are an ideal choice when wearing slim cut trousers.Product DetailsBlack hip brief, has a soft elasticated waistband with branding on it, Calvin Klein X brand patch in front on the waistband, body defining Fit, cotton modal stretch for comfort and shape retention and a double layered pouch for enhanced comfortMaterial and Care55% cotton, 37% modal and 8% elastaneMachine wash coldDo not bleach or ironTumble dry low
